# This is the CMakeCache file.
# For build in directory: /home/kuehne88/work/cp2k_gxtb_partial_root_bridge_35e7942_release_20260716
# It was generated by CMake: /home/kuehne88/work/codex-gxtb-pbc-20260714T1038Z-18d37c-1449feb/env/bin/cmake
# You can edit this file to change values found and used by cmake.
# If you do not want to change any of the values, simply exit the editor.
# If you do want to change a value, simply edit, save, and exit the editor.
# The syntax for the file is as follows:
# KEY:TYPE=VALUE
# KEY is the name of a variable in the cache.
# TYPE is a hint to GUIs for the type of VALUE, DO NOT EDIT TYPE!.
# VALUE is the current value for the KEY.

########################
# EXTERNAL cache entries
########################

//Build CP2K shared library
BUILD_SHARED_LIBS:BOOL=ON

//Path to a program.

//Path to a program.
CMAKE_AR:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/ar

//Single output directory for building all libraries.

// MinSizeRel ...

//No help, variable specified on the command line.

//No help, variable specified on the command line.
CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER:UNINITIALIZED=/home/kuehne88/work/codex-gxtb-pbc-20260714T1038Z-18d37c-1449feb/env/bin/mpicxx

//A wrapper around 'ar' adding the appropriate '--plugin' option
// for the GCC compiler
CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_AR:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/gcc-ar

//A wrapper around 'ranlib' adding the appropriate '--plugin' option
// for the GCC compiler
CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_RANLIB:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/gcc-ranlib

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during all build types.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS:STRING=

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during DEBUG builds.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_DEBUG:STRING=-g

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during MINSIZEREL builds.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_MINSIZEREL:STRING=-Os -DNDEBUG

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during RELEASE builds.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_RELEASE:STRING=-O3 -DNDEBUG

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during RELWITHDEBINFO builds.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_RELWITHDEBINFO:STRING=-O2 -g -DNDEBUG

//If this value is on, makefiles will be generated without the
// .SILENT directive, and all commands will be echoed to the console
// during the make.  This is useful for debugging only. With Visual
// Studio IDE projects all commands are done without /nologo.
CMAKE_VERBOSE_MAKEFILE:BOOL=FALSE

//32 bits integers are used for indices, matrices and vectors sizes
CP2K_BLAS_INTERFACE:STRING=32bits

//threaded blas library
CP2K_BLAS_THREADING:STRING=gnu-thread

//blas vendor/generic libraries
CP2K_BLAS_VENDOR:STRING=auto

//Set the location for CP2K data
CP2K_DATA_DIR:STRING=default

//Disable the DBCSR accelerated backend
CP2K_DBCSR_USE_CPU_ONLY:BOOL=OFF

//Check that the list of compiled files and files contained in
// src match
CP2K_ENABLE_CONSISTENCY_CHECKS:BOOL=OFF

//Enable the dbm accelerated backend (mostly GPU).
CP2K_ENABLE_DBM_GPU:BOOL=ON

//Path to a file.
CP2K_MKL_INCLUDE_DIRS:PATH=CP2K_MKL_INCLUDE_DIRS-NOTFOUND

//NVPL BLACS MPI interface
CP2K_NVPL_SCALAPACK_MPI:STRING=auto

//ScaLAPACK vendor/generic backend
CP2K_SCALAPACK_VENDOR:STRING=auto

//tblite implementation to use: UPSTREAM or SAVE
CP2K_TBLITE_PROVIDER:STRING=SAVE

//Source revision of the selected tblite implementation
CP2K_TBLITE_REVISION:STRING=unknown

//Set hardware acceleration support: CUDA, HIP, OPENCL
CP2K_USE_ACCEL:STRING=NONE

//Enable ACE support
CP2K_USE_ACE:BOOL=OFF

//Enable COSMA support
CP2K_USE_COSMA:BOOL=OFF

//Enable Cray PM energy framework
CP2K_USE_CRAY_PM_ENERGY:BOOL=OFF

//Return DBCSR cmake configuration parameters
CP2K_USE_DBCSR_CONFIG:BOOL=OFF

//Enable DeePMD support
CP2K_USE_DEEPMD:BOOL=OFF

//Enable DFTD4 support
CP2K_USE_DFTD4:BOOL=OFF

//Enable DLA-Future support
CP2K_USE_DLAF:BOOL=OFF

//Enable ELPA support
CP2K_USE_ELPA:BOOL=OFF

//Enable all dependencies. They can be individually turned off
// again.
CP2K_USE_EVERYTHING:BOOL=OFF

//Enable FFTW3 support
CP2K_USE_FFTW3:BOOL=OFF

//MKL has its own compatible implementation of the FFTW3 library.
// This option, when ON, will use the separate and original FFTW3
// library.
CP2K_USE_FFTW3_WITH_MKL:BOOL=OFF

//Enable GauXC support
CP2K_USE_GAUXC:BOOL=OFF

//Enable GreenX support
CP2K_USE_GREENX:BOOL=OFF

//Enable HDF5 support
CP2K_USE_HDF5:BOOL=OFF

//Enable LibFCI active-space solver support
CP2K_USE_LIBFCI:BOOL=OFF

//Enable Libint2 support
CP2K_USE_LIBINT2:BOOL=OFF

//Enable LibSMEAGOL support
CP2K_USE_LIBSMEAGOL:BOOL=OFF

//Enable LibTorch support
CP2K_USE_LIBTORCH:BOOL=OFF

//Enable LibXC support
CP2K_USE_LIBXC:BOOL=OFF

//Enable LIBXS support; required if OpenCL backend enabled
CP2K_USE_LIBXS:BOOL=OFF

//Enable MIMIC support
CP2K_USE_MIMIC:BOOL=OFF

//Enable MPI support
CP2K_USE_MPI:BOOL=ON

//Enable MPI Fortran 2008 interface
CP2K_USE_MPI_F08:BOOL=OFF

//OFF
CP2K_USE_NVHPC:BOOL=OFF

//No help, variable specified on the command line.
CP2K_USE_OPENMP:UNINITIALIZED=ON

//Enable OpenPMD I/O support
CP2K_USE_OPENPMD:BOOL=OFF

//Enable PEXSI support
CP2K_USE_PEXSI:BOOL=OFF

//Enable PLUMED2 support
CP2K_USE_PLUMED:BOOL=OFF

//No help, variable specified on the command line.
CP2K_USE_SCALAPACK:UNINITIALIZED=ON

//Enable Spglib support

//Enable SpLA support

//Executable for running MPI programs.
MPIEXEC_EXECUTABLE:FILEPATH=/home/kuehne88/work/codex-gxtb-pbc-20260714T1038Z-18d37c-1449feb/env/bin/mpiexec

//Maximum number of processors available to run MPI applications.
MPIEXEC_MAX_NUMPROCS:STRING=240

//Flag used by MPI to specify the number of processes for mpiexec;
// the next option will be the number of processes.
MPIEXEC_NUMPROC_FLAG:STRING=-n

//These flags will be placed after all flags passed to mpiexec.
MPIEXEC_POSTFLAGS:STRING=

//These flags will be directly before the executable that is being
// run by mpiexec.
MPIEXEC_PREFLAGS:STRING=

//MPI CXX additional include directories
MPI_CXX_ADDITIONAL_INCLUDE_DIRS:STRING=
